deltas.releaseNoteText: Also added a `triggerActivities` flag on the `CommentData` schema in the `POST /v2/commentannotations/add` endpoint — when set to `true` on an individual comment, an activity record is automatically created on comment addition.
deltas.summary: Create a new rule documenting the triggerActivities boolean parameter on the POST /v2/commentannotations/add REST API endpoint — when set to true on a CommentData entry, an activity record is automatically created for that comment addition, subject to workspace-level activityServiceConfig being enabled.

parameters.name: triggerActivities
parameters.description: When true, adding this comment via the REST API automatically creates an activity record. Requires workspace-level activityServiceConfig to be enabled. Default: false. Set at the individual CommentData level, not the annotation level.

reason: The Activity Service REST API endpoints (POST /v2/activities/get|add|update|delete) are a distinct feature category from Notifications. Although served via the notificationsapibe cloud function, they operate on a separate /v2/activities/ URL path and represent a parallel activity-tracking system, not an extension of the Notifications REST API surface covered by the existing data-rest-api.md and triggers-custom.md rules. No existing Notifications skill rule was added, modified, or removed by this release. The bug fix disabling removeCommentTextTrigger and removeCommentTextSdktestTrigger is Comments-only and does not affect the Notifications skill.

The Activity Service REST API addendum introduces no CRDT API or behavior changes. The CRDT skill deltas for this version (setActivityDebounceTime and CrdtActivityActionTypes) were captured in the prior agent-7-skills-deltas-5.0.2-beta.7.json file covering the SDK release. This REST API addendum has no additional CRDT impact.
